title: M22-4, Part II, Chapter 2, Section D, Topics 01-05:  Chapter 33 Processing Screens in DGI
description: Section D, Topics 1-5 discuss the following chapter 33 processing screens:  Topic 1: DGI Login Screen, Topic 2: Authorized Users Warning Screen, Topic 3: Search Chapter 33 Screen, Topic 4: Claimant Biography Screen, and Topic 5: Enrollment Verification Screen.
keywords: Digital GI Bill (DGIB) eMPWR Managed Service Enterprise Management of Payment Workload and Reporting
